aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as schema markup and some relevant content. However, there is room for improvement in content depth, local SEO, and user engagement.
quick_wins: Add more detailed content about services and expertise to improve keyword relevance and depth.
Implement a review generation strategy to build up Google Business Profile reviews.
Optimize meta tags and headers with targeted keywords for better search visibility.

gbp_analysis.found: No active Google Business Profile found based on the provided website.
gbp_analysis.summary: The absence of a Google Business Profile severely impacts local search visibility and customer trust.
critical_issues: No GBP listing exists, leading to missed opportunities for local search traffic.
Lack of customer reviews and engagement metrics that a GBP would provide.

nap_citations.summary: Inconsistent or incomplete NAP (Name, Address, Phone) citations across the web may confuse search engines and potential customers.
action_items: Audit and update NAP information across all online directories and platforms.
Ensure NAP consistency on the website, social media, and local directories.
Claim and verify local business listings on major platforms like Yelp, Bing, and Apple Maps.

schema_gaps: No Organization schema found; this is crucial for establishing brand identity.
Missing Service schema for detailed service listings.
No FAQPage schema to address common customer queries.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of localized content and engagement signals.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for local electrician services in Escondido.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Creating localized service pages and embedding with relevant keywords.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Building backlinks from local business directories and industry-related websites to boost domain authority.
